import numpy as np
from typing import List

def compute_features(data: List[float]) -> np.ndarray:
    values = np.array(data)
    return np.sin(values) + np.cos(values)

def aggregate_scores(scores: List[np.ndarray]) -> np.ndarray:
    normalized = [(s - s.mean()) / s.std() for s in scores]
    return np.concatenate(normalized)

def build_matrix(rows: List[List[float]]) -> np.ndarray:
    arr = np.array(rows)
    return arr ** 2
